title: Compound V
description: Superpowers inspired by The Boys, served by the bottle. Drink experimental serums and try to keep your ability alive. -> Compound V Plugin
body:
# 🧪 CompoundV ### *Inject the powers of* The Boys *into Minecraft.*
--- > Most heroes don't get their powers in a lab. > On your server, they will. **One bottle at a time.** CompoundV is a modular ability plugin inspired by *The Boys*. Players drink experimental serums to roll for super powers — from flight and heat vision to a one-shot chest beam that vaporizes anyone in its path. Every ability has real controls, real cooldowns, and real consequences.
🧪 Drink. Pray. Survive. 🧪
--- ## 🧪 The Serums | Serum | Color | What it does | | :-: | :-: | :-- | | **Compound V** | 💙 | The classic. Random ability, permanent until death. Heroes are extremely rare. | | **Temp V** | 💚 | A weaker, time-limited dose. Power fades after a configurable duration. | | **V One** | 🩵 | The refined formula. Only rolls top-tier abilities. | | **Anti V** | ❤️ | The cure. Drink to remove your current ability. | | **V-Null Virus** | 🟣 | A bio-weapon. Infects and strips abilities from any supe it hits. Splash & lingering variants available. | All serums are crafted step-by-step at the **workbench**. Type `/cv tutorial` to receive the full in-game crafting handbook. > **Right-click** a bottle to drink. After a short activation, your power is unlocked. --- ## 🦸 The Abilities
🔴 The Patriot — like Homelander
The face of Vought. Untouchable, arrogant, absolutely lethal. **Compound V's rarest roll** — the **V One variant** is even stronger. - ✈️ **Permanent flight** — automatic, no toggle - 🔥 **Heat Vision** — press **F** to toggle a high-damage eye beam with overheat system - 👁️ **X-Ray** — **Sneak + Right-Click** to reveal nearby entities through walls - 🚀 **Jump Start** — **Sneak**, look up, then **Jump** to launch yourself skyward - 💥 **Sonic Boom Landing** — fall from 30+ blocks for a devastating impact explosion - 💪 Permanent **Strength III**, **Resistance II**, **Regeneration** & **+10 bonus hearts** > 🩸 *V One variant adds Strength IV, Resistance III, fire resistance, faster flight and a stronger Jump Start.*
🟡 The Veteran — like Soldier Boy  ·  V One exclusive
The original supe. Pissed off, off the grid, and packing nuclear-grade firepower in his chest. - 💪 Passive **Strength V** and **Resistance III** - ☢️ **Chest Beam** — **Sneak + Right-Click** to fire a thick yellow energy beam for 3 seconds - Tears through blocks · ignites everything it touches · melts players and mobs - **Strips abilities from any supe it hits** — *yes, even another Patriot* - 💥 **Ground Zero** — releases a massive visual shockwave on cast - ⏳ 45 second cooldown — use it wisely
🌊 The Diver — like The Deep
- 🐬 Extreme underwater speed with Dolphin's Grace and water-only movement boost - 📡 **Sonar** — **Sneak + Right-Click** to reveal nearby entities through terrain - ⚔️ Bonus Strength and Resistance while submerged
🏃 The Runner — like A-Train
- ⚡ Speed stages scaling to top velocity — press **F** to toggle - 💥 High-speed impact damage on collision with entities - 🧊 Special movement bonuses when sprinting over water
👻 The Ghost — like Translucent
- Press **F** — activates Ghost Mode (**Invisibility II** + Resistance + Strength) - 🔥 Passive **Fire Resistance** - 🛡️ Immune to Heat Vision damage while invisible - 🐺 Active mobs drop targeting while Ghost Mode is on - ⏱️ 5 second toggle cooldown
🔥 Heat Vision I / II / III / IV
Four separately rollable tiers. Color indicates tier: blue → green → orange → red. - Press **F** to toggle - **Overheat system** — extended use triggers a cooldown; toggle off early to reset the timer - Cooks raw mob drops on kill · clears vegetation in the beam path
🔵 Sonic Boom — like Bombsight  ·  V One exclusive
- 💪 Passive Strength IV, Resistance IV, **+10 bonus hearts**, projectile immunity - ✈️ Electric flight at 3× speed with a powerful jump start - **Sneak + Left-Click** — fires a **Sonic Beam** (Warden-style, 3s cooldown) - Press **F** — launches a **Sonic Ring** (30s cooldown) with knockback and area damage - 💥 Explosive landing from height (30s cooldown)
⚡ Stormstrike — like Stormfront  ·  V One exclusive
- 💪 Passive Strength, Resistance and extra hearts - ✈️ Electric flight with lightning jump-start particles - Press **F** — toggles a **lightning beam** dealing tick damage in a wide arc - Melee hits trigger **real lightning strikes** on the target - Fall impact summons **4 visible lightning effects**
💛 Heal Angel — like Private Angel  ·  V One exclusive
- 💪 Passive Strength II, Resistance II, Regeneration II, **+5 bonus hearts** - **Sneak + Left-Click** — heals a nearby entity (min 1 heart, 1s cooldown) - Press **F** — **commands** a nearby mob to follow and protect you (they won't attack their owner)
🌊 Submarine — like Submarine  ·  V One exclusive
A supercharged aquatic fighter — The Diver's true evolution. - 💪 Doubled Strength and Resistance bonuses while submerged - **Sneak + Left-Click** — extended **Sonar** pulse revealing entities through terrain - Press **F** — powerful **Riptide Dash** (1s cooldown) for underwater mobility
🦘 Jumper
- 💪 Passive Strength I - Press **F** — **Jump Boost V** + temporary fall damage immunity - ⏱️ 15 second cooldown
💥 Shockwave
- 💪 Passive Strength II, Resistance I - Press **F** — 10-block pressure wave, heavy knockback (3 hearts vs players, 6 vs mobs) - ⚡ Critical hits automatically trigger mini shockwaves - ⏱️ 2 minute cooldown
🪱 The Worm
- ⛏️ Permanent **Haste IV** — mine through anything instantly - Press **F** — toggle **Night Vision** - 💪 Passive Strength I, Resistance I
💡 Flash Light — like Starlight
- 💪 Passive Strength II, Resistance I - Press **F** — **15-block Blindness burst** hitting all nearby entities - **Sneak + Left-Click** — focused **light beam attack**
🔥 FireSonic
- 🔥 Passive Fire Resistance, Strength I, Resistance I - Press **F** — toggles a close-range **fire beam** dealing tick damage - Melee hits apply fire pressure on every hit
☠️ Toxic Cloud
- 🧪 Permanent **Poison Immunity** - Press **F** — releases a **poison gas cloud** around you - **Sneak + Left-Click** — short-range **poison vomit** targeting entities ahead
🔥 The Countess — like Crimson Countess
- 🔥 Passive Fire Resistance, Strength II, Resistance I · flight enabled - Press **F** — launches a **fireball** - Double jump mid-air activates a **fire jump boost** - Melee hits apply burn damage
⚔️ The Warrior — like Queen Maeve
- 💪 Passive Strength III, Resistance II, Regeneration I, **+10 bonus hearts** · flight enabled - Double jump available mid-air - Landing from height triggers a **small shockwave**
💀 The Headpopper — like Victoria Neuman
- 💪 Passive Strength II, Resistance II, Regeneration I - **Sneak + Right-Click** — locks a red mark on the target; hold Sneak to trigger a countdown and deal heavy damage (release Sneak to cancel) - Press **F** — area pulse hitting all nearby entities - 🛡️ Immune to Heat Vision damage
🕷️ SpiderWeaver — like WebWeaver
- 💪 Passive Strength I, Resistance I, Regeneration I - Press **F** — fires a **web projectile** trapping entities in cobwebs - **Sneak + Left-Click** — places a **cobweb trap** at your location - 🧗 **Wall Climbing** — hold Sneak while touching a wall
💣 The Detonator — like Naqib
- 🔥 Passive Fire Resistance, Strength II, Resistance I - **Sneak (hold)** — charges a countdown, then releases a **large self-centered explosion** (self-damage protection active) - Every **3rd melee hit** triggers an **explosive strike** - Melee hits apply fire damage
📏 Size Changer
- **Sneak + Left-Click looking up** → Giant form (+10 hearts, doubled melee, Jump Boost II) - **Sneak + Left-Click looking down** → Tiny form (~3.5× smaller) - Cooldown starts after returning to normal size - **V One upgrade** available with stronger bonuses
🌀 Teleporter
Short-range blink ability. **V One upgrade** available for longer range and reduced cooldown.
✈️ Flight  ·  ⚡ Speedster  ·  💪 Super Strength  ·  ♨️ Fire  ·  👁️ Vision
Classic standalone powers. - **Flight** — Permanent creative-style flight with a basic Jump Start - **Speedster** — Toggle Speed IV · sprint Resistance bonus - **Super Strength** — Passive Strength III + Resistance. No cooldown. You just hit harder. Forever. - **Fire** — Passive ring of fire ignites nearby enemies · Fire Resistance included - **Vision** — **Sneak + Right-Click** to reveal entities through walls with a glowing effect
--- ## 🎮 Abilities Showcase Heat Vision — press F, melt everything The Veteran's Chest Beam — nuclear option, ability-stripping The Patriot's Jump Start — launch yourself skyward --- ## 🎮 Controls Cheat Sheet | Action | Input | | :-- | :-: | | Toggle ability (Heat Vision, Ghost Mode, beams…) | **F** *(swap offhand)* | | Secondary / special attack | **Sneak + Left-Click** | | Special 2 / X-Ray / Chest Beam / charge | **Sneak + Right-Click** | | Jump Start | **Sneak + look up + Jump** | | Double Jump | **Jump** mid-air | | Wall Climb *(SpiderWeaver)* | **Sneak** on a wall | | Drink serum | **Right-Click** bottle | > 📖 Run `/cv tutorial` in-game to receive a full written handbook with every crafting chain and control reference. --- ## 📋 Commands & Permissions
📜 Commands
Main command: `/compoundv` — alias: `/cv` | Command | Description | | :-- | :-- | | `/cv help` | Show the in-game help | | `/cv info [player]` | View your own or another player's active ability | | `/cv tutorial` | Receive the in-game crafting & ability handbook *(aliases: `/cv guide`, `/cv book`)* | | `/cv give bottle ` | Give a serum bottle | | `/cv give [potionType]` | Directly assign an ability | | `/cv remove ` | Strip a player's ability | | `/cv reload` | Reload config and language files |
🔑 Permissions
| Permission | Default | Description | | :-- | :-: | :-- | | `compoundv.use` | `true` | Drink serums and use abilities | | `compoundv.admin` | `op` | Use all `/cv` admin commands |
--- ## 🌍 Languages English, German, Spanish, French, Hindi and Russian ship out of the box. Set `language: en` (or `de`, `es`, `fr`, `hi`, `ru`) in `config.yml`. Drop a custom file into `plugins/CompoundV/lang/` to add more. --- ## ❓ FAQ
💀 What happens when I die with an ability?
By default, you lose it. Same risk Vought's heroes never had — and exactly what makes serums valuable and PvP genuinely tense.
⏱️ How long do Temp V abilities last?
The duration is rolled per drink between `min_duration_minutes` and `max_duration_minutes` (default: 15–120 min). When the timer runs out, the ability fades automatically.
🎲 Why is The Patriot so rare?
By design. Default weight is `1` against a combined pool of 100+. Tweak the weight in `config.yml` if you want him more common.
🔧 Can I disable abilities or change roll chances?
Yes. Set any ability's chance to `0` in `config.yml` to disable it, or adjust the number to influence roll frequency. Run `/cv reload` to apply without restart.
🧪 Can two players have the same ability at the same time?
Yes. Every drink rolls independently — there's no global lock. Two Patriots on one server? That's a tournament.
---
Created by **Thomas U.** Inspired by *The Boys* (Amazon Prime Video / Garth Ennis & Darick Robertson). This is a **fan-made, non-commercial project** and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Amazon, Sony Pictures Television, or the rights holders of *The Boys*.
